framework.name: Buyer/Seller Protections Extended to Agent Commerce
framework.description: PayPal explicitly extends existing buyer/seller protections, dispute resolution, and tracking to agent-initiated transactions. This is a partial answer to the liability question — PayPal is treating agent purchases like human purchases under existing chargeback frameworks rather than creating new ones.
framework.raw_quote: PayPal's buyer and seller protections, and post-purchase services such as tracking and dispute resolution, benefits that consumers value when checking out with PayPal

source.title: Press Release: OpenAI and PayPal Team Up to Power Instant Checkout and Agentic Commerce in ChatGPT - Oct 28, 2025
